title: Buyers beware (Caveat Emptor) on Zeakers Automobiles
description: Buyers beware (Caveat Emptor) on Zeakers Automobiles The immediate family of Isaac Atufe, CEO of Zeakers Automobiles wish to advise existing and prospective customers of the brand to stop patronizing
html:
Buyers beware (Caveat Emptor) on Zeakers Automobiles

The immediate family of Isaac Atufe, CEO of Zeakers Automobiles wish to advise existing and prospective customers of the brand to stop patronizing him for automobiles or for any other financial related business he is associated with because of recent developments that are associated with the firm.

We will not be responsible for any further association with the brand going forward.

The general public should take note.

Signed

Friday Atufe (Patriarch of the family)
